title: Evangelion Camping Tent
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Camping... Tent             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sat Apr 25, 2015 11:09 pm Since nobody has commented on this and I can't find any info on the subject, a quick question: What's up with THIS ? More specifically, where can I find that awesome camping tent!? The Google translator isn't helping much, and all I could find is the t-shit Kaworu is wearing in the promotional art at some Eva store... Is it a prototype of an actual product or othe of the many deviants of Evangelion-based merchandise? Also, has anyone noticed that this is probably the first anything Eva-related that is not using Rei or Asuka or any female for selling???

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Sun Apr 26, 2015 6:44 am Why does Kaworu get featured in so much promotional material?

[]:             Quote Post by Ari » Sun Apr 26, 2015 11:23 am Tumbling Down wrote: Why does Kaworu get featured in so much promotional material?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Apr 26, 2015 1:32 pm Kensuke's time to shine, denied.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 26, 2015 1:54 pm Nope, not denied at all. From a few days back: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by TomasJC » Wed Apr 29, 2015 4:26 pm Ooh, now YOU can be the Commander from your very own Geofront Pyramid!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Apr 30, 2015 9:17 pm Why do they put Kensuke and Toji there to cockblock Shinji and Kaworu's alone time. This reminds me of a Big Johnson shirt design from 20 years ago:

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Fri May 01, 2015 11:41 pm After more researching it appears it's going to be a limited sale with preorders around the 15th of this month and it will not be released until August... Priced at $240 bucks...
